title: Transaction
description: A canonical expense-tracking transaction, optionally enriched with receipt line items and category allocations.

id.description: Application-level stable identifier for this transaction.

source.description: How this transaction entered the system.

accountId.description: Account that produced the statement row, when applicable.

postedDate.description: Date the transaction posted to the account, when different from the transaction date.

description.description: Statement-provided transaction description, when separate from the payee.

mcc.description: Merchant Category Code extracted from a credit card statement, when available.

mccDescription.description: Textual description of the Merchant Category Code category, when available.

braveSearchResult.description: JSON-encoded Brave Search result summaries containing only title and description fields.

amount.description: Signed transaction amount from the account perspective.

categoryAllocations.description: Budget category splits for the transaction total.

receipt.description: Itemized receipt data associated with this transaction.

receiptDataExtractionService.description: Receipt data extraction service used for this transaction, such as azure-doc-intelligence or gemini-3-flash-lite.

receiptImageExtractionResults.description: JSON-encoded map of raw receipt image extraction service responses keyed by service name, such as azure-doc-intelligence or gemini.

linkedTransactionIds.description: Deprecated pairwise links to other transaction records that represent the same real-world purchase. Prefer transactionGroupId for display grouping.

transactionGroupId.description: Stable identifier shared by imported transaction records that represent the same real-world transaction. UIs should collapse records with the same group id into one displayed transaction.

groupRole.description: How this source record should participate when a transaction group is displayed.

matchStatus.description: Current matching state for this transaction record.

matchSource.description: How the transaction match or grouping decision was made.

matchConfidence.description: Confidence score for automated or suggested transaction matching.

decimalString.description: Decimal amount encoded as a string to avoid floating point rounding errors.

amount.description: Signed amount allocated to this category.

confidence.description: Confidence score when the category was inferred.

sourceDocumentId.description: Uploaded image, PDF or extraction job identifier.

total.description: Receipt total as shown by the merchant or source document. Usually positive for purchases; transaction amount carries the account-perspective sign.

description.description: Normalized, user-facing receipt line item description.

rawDescription.description: Raw receipt line item description as extracted from the source document.

braveSearchResult.description: JSON-encoded Brave Search result summaries containing only title and description fields.

amount.description: Signed line amount, including discounts or returns when negative.

discountAmount.description: Signed discount amount applied to this item, when a following discount line was merged into it.

discountDescription.description: Raw description from a discount line merged into this item.

netAmount.description: Final item amount after applying any item-level discount amount.

confidence.description: Confidence score when the line category or extraction was inferred.
